headline: Backed by people who have seen this story before.
lead: Tag Rides is a Tony Elumelu Foundation grantee and is being built inside the Google for Startups and Microsoft for Startups ecosystems. The founder is also an ALX Ventures program graduate.

programs.name: Tony Elumelu Foundation
programs.note: Selected and funded by TEF to build TagRides.

programs.name: Google for Startups
programs.note: In the Google for Startups program.

programs.name: Microsoft for Startups
programs.note: Building on Azure as a Microsoft Founders Hub member.
